communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am stating the purpose of this request so that you may assist me as required by California Government Code (“Gov”) § 7922.600(a)(1). The purpose of this California Public Records Act request is to determine the existence or non-existence of a specific record.

Please note that I am not requesting the record itself, only confirmation of its existence or non-existence. Thus, Civil Code § 1798.90.55, law enforcement exemptions, the public interest exemption or any other laws or exemptions do not apply to, and are not relevant to, this request.

Please confirm the existence or non-existence of the following Flock Safety ALPR footage record:

License Plate: WCD6448 Texas
Date: March 22, 2026
Time Frame: 11:15 AM - 11:25 AM
Camera Location: On East side of Valencia St, just North of Cesar Chavez St
Camera Lat/long: 37.74830951712188, -122.42020523544745

The following provisions of the CPRA are expected to apply to *all* elements of this request:

A:  Per Article 1, Section 3(b)(2) of the California Constitution, broadly construe all provisions that further the public’s right to access, and apply any limitations on access as narrowly as possible.

B:  Per §7922.535(a), catalog the responsive records or information, and describe their location. The identification of all records is applicable even if the record is withheld, pursuant to a lawful exemption to the CPRA, or redacted in whole or in part.

C:  Pursuant to this PRA request, and to your obligations under GOV § 7922.600(a), which obligates public agencies to assist the public to make focused and effective requests that reasonably describe identifiable records, with respect to all exempted or withheld documents I request assistance in the following ways:

a. Please assist me in identifying records and information responsive to the request or purpose of the request;

b. Please describe the information technology and physical location in which the records exist;

c. Please provide me with suggestions for overcoming any practical basis for denying access to the records or information sought.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

David Moore

title: NY Department of Health Complaints against Iv Medical, Athanasian, HS2 2024-26.

communications.subject: New York Freedom of Information Law Request: NY Department of Health Complaints against Iv Medical, Athanasian, HS2 2024-26.
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

Any and all complaints made about or regarding either "Iv Medical", "HS2", or the individual doctor "Edward Athanasian" during the date range March 1, 2024 to February 28, 2026.

In these records we would like to see the following, if available:
1. The text of the complaint, else a summary if text is not available.
2. Date complaint was filed
3. Current status of complaint / whether resolved
4. Amount in dispute, if regarding financial complaint
5. Date of service with the provider
6. Date of payment made to the provider, if available.
7. Any other information you can provide.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tracie McMillan

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: State Documents on Palantir 19AQMM25F7364
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

- All statements of work, invoices, purchases orders, contracts, loan agreements, procurement documents (but not limited to solicitation documents or notices of proposed contracts, proposed bids, unsolicited proposals, and/or documents justifying contracting without full and open competition), relating to the following Award IDs:

19AQMM25F7364

In order to help to determine my status to assess fees, you should know that I am a journalist writing for 404 Media and that this request is being made as part of news gathering.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Joseph Cox

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Flock camera contract details: contract/hardware/software cost to tax payers, how long current contracts are active, privacy guarantees for citizens, who has authorized access to cameras, contract termination requirements, whether or not citizens can request footage, how long video/data is stored for, has AI and/or facial recognition software been installed, have microphone software updates occurred (as stated by Flock employees), and if they haven't had facial recognition/ microphone updates, are those updates going to be implemented at any point in the future?

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Concerned Citizen
